# plyr.fm

> audio streaming platform built on the AT Protocol (ATProto). users own their audio data in personal data servers (PDS). open API, Python SDK, and MCP server for integrations.

## key URLs

- App: https://plyr.fm
- API: https://api.plyr.fm
- Docs: https://docs.plyr.fm
- OpenAPI spec: https://api.plyr.fm/docs
- Source: https://github.com/zzstoatzz/plyr.fm
- Python SDK: https://github.com/zzstoatzz/plyr-python-client

## ATProto namespace

- Production: `fm.plyr` (e.g. `fm.plyr.track`)
- Staging: `fm.plyr.stg`
- Development: `fm.plyr.dev`
- NSIDs are reverse-DNS format, NOT URLs

---

## quickstart (Python SDK)

```bash
uv add plyrfm
```

```python
from plyrfm import PlyrClient

client = PlyrClient()

# search for tracks
results = client.search("ambient")
for track in results:
    print(f"{track.title} by {track.artist}")
    print(f"  stream: {track.stream_url}")

# get top tracks
for track in client.top_tracks(limit=5):
    print(f"{track.title} — {track.play_count} plays")

# authenticated: like a track (requires developer token)
authed = PlyrClient(token="your_token_from_plyr.fm/portal")
authed.like(track_id=42)
```

## MCP server (for AI assistants)

```bash
claude mcp add plyr-fm -- uvx plyrfm-mcp
```

Tools: search, list_tracks, top_tracks, tracks_by_tag, get_track, liked_tracks, my_tracks.

---

## API reference

Base URL: `https://api.plyr.fm`
Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <developer_token>` (get tokens at plyr.fm/portal)

### public endpoints (no auth)

```
GET  /search/?q={query}&type={tracks|artists|albums|tags|playlists}&limit=10
GET  /search/vibe?q={mood_description}&limit=5      # semantic mood search (feature-flagged)
GET  /tracks/?limit=20&cursor={iso_timestamp}         # list tracks
GET  /tracks/{id}                                      # get track
GET  /tracks/{id}/stream                               # stream audio (307 redirect)
GET  /tracks/top?limit=10                              # top tracks by plays
GET  /tracks/{id}/likes                                # who liked this track
GET  /tracks/{id}/comments                             # timed comments
GET  /tracks/tags                                      # all tags with counts
GET  /albums/?artist_did={did}                         # list albums
GET  /albums/{handle}/{slug}                           # album detail
GET  /lists/?owner_did={did}                           # list playlists
GET  /lists/{id}                                       # playlist detail
GET  /artists/{did}                                    # artist profile
GET  /stats                                            # platform stats
GET  /oembed?url={plyr.fm_url}                         # oEmbed
GET  /feeds/artist/{handle}                            # RSS feed
GET  /feeds/album/{handle}/{slug}                      # album RSS
GET  /feeds/playlist/{id}                              # playlist RSS
GET  /health                                           # health check
GET  /config                                           # platform config
```

### authenticated endpoints

```
POST   /tracks/{id}/like                               # like a track
DELETE /tracks/{id}/like                               # unlike
POST   /tracks/{id}/play                               # record play
POST   /tracks/{id}/comments                           # post timed comment
POST   /tracks/                                        # upload track (multipart)
PATCH  /tracks/{id}                                    # edit track
DELETE /tracks/{id}                                    # delete track
GET    /tracks/liked                                   # your liked tracks
GET    /tracks/me                                      # your tracks
POST   /albums/                                        # create album
PATCH  /albums/{id}                                    # edit album
DELETE /albums/{id}                                    # delete album
POST   /lists/                                         # create playlist
PATCH  /lists/{id}                                     # edit playlist
DELETE /lists/{id}                                     # delete playlist
```

### common response: TrackResponse

```json
{
  "id": 42,
  "title": "midnight rain",
  "description": "late night ambient",
  "artist": {
    "did": "did:plc:abc",
    "handle": "artist.bsky.social",
    "display_name": "artist",
    "avatar_url": "https://..."
  },
  "album": { "id": "uuid", "title": "nocturne", "slug": "nocturne" },
  "image_url": "https://...",
  "thumbnail_url": "https://...",
  "file_type": "mp3",
  "duration": 180,
  "play_count": 1234,
  "like_count": 56,
  "comment_count": 12,
  "is_liked": false,
  "is_public": true,
  "tags": ["ambient", "electronic"],
  "created_at": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "atproto_record_uri": "at://did:plc:abc/fm.plyr.track/3abc123"
}
```

### errors

```json
{ "detail": "error message" }
```

| status | meaning |
|--------|---------|
| 400 | bad request |
| 401 | unauthorized |
| 402 | payment required (supporter-gated) |
| 403 | forbidden (scope or ownership) |
| 404 | not found |
| 409 | conflict (queue revision) |
| 429 | rate limit exceeded |

### pagination

Cursor-based with ISO timestamps:
```
GET /tracks/?limit=20
→ { tracks: [...], next_cursor: "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z", has_more: true }
```

---

## authentication

### developer tokens (simplest)

1. Go to plyr.fm/portal → "developer tokens"
2. Name token, choose expiry (default: 180 days)
3. Authorize via OAuth flow
4. Use as Bearer token: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

### OAuth 2.1 flow (for apps)

```
POST /auth/start?handle=user.bsky.social  → redirect to PDS auth
GET  /auth/callback?code=...&state=...    → exchange_token
POST /auth/exchange { exchange_token }     → session_id
```

Session: HttpOnly cookie (`session_id`), 14-day lifetime, auto-refresh.

### scopes

| scope | purpose |
|-------|---------|
| repo:fm.plyr.track | tracks CRUD |
| repo:fm.plyr.like | likes |
| repo:fm.plyr.comment | timed comments |
| repo:fm.plyr.list | playlists/albums |
| repo:fm.plyr.actor.profile | artist profile |
| blob:*/* | file uploads |

---

## lexicon schemas

### fm.plyr.track

```json
{
  "lexicon": 1,
  "id": "fm.plyr.track",
  "defs": {
    "main": {
      "type": "record",
      "key": "tid",
      "record": {
        "required": ["title", "artist", "fileType", "createdAt"],
        "properties": {
          "title": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 256 },
          "artist": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 256 },
          "audioUrl": { "type": "string", "format": "uri" },
          "audioBlob": { "type": "blob", "accept": ["audio/*"], "maxSize": 104857600 },
          "fileType": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 16 },
          "album": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 256 },
          "duration": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 0 },
          "imageUrl": { "type": "string", "format": "uri" },
          "description": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 5000 },
          "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" },
          "supportGate": { "type": "ref", "ref": "#supportGate" },
          "features": { "type": "array", "items": { "ref": "#featuredArtist" }, "maxLength": 10 }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

At least one of `audioUrl` or `audioBlob` must be present.

### fm.plyr.like

```json
{
  "lexicon": 1,
  "id": "fm.plyr.like",
  "defs": {
    "main": {
      "type": "record",
      "key": "tid",
      "record": {
        "required": ["subject", "createdAt"],
        "properties": {
          "subject": { "type": "ref", "ref": "com.atproto.repo.strongRef" },
          "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### fm.plyr.comment

```json
{
  "lexicon": 1,
  "id": "fm.plyr.comment",
  "defs": {
    "main": {
      "type": "record",
      "key": "tid",
      "record": {
        "required": ["subject", "text", "timestampMs", "createdAt"],
        "properties": {
          "subject": { "type": "ref", "ref": "com.atproto.repo.strongRef" },
          "text": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1, "maxLength": 1000 },
          "timestampMs": { "type": "integer", "minimum": 0 },
          "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" },
          "updatedAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### fm.plyr.list

```json
{
  "lexicon": 1,
  "id": "fm.plyr.list",
  "defs": {
    "main": {
      "type": "record",
      "key": "tid",
      "record": {
        "required": ["items", "createdAt"],
        "properties": {
          "name": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 256 },
          "listType": { "type": "string", "knownValues": ["album", "playlist", "liked"] },
          "items": { "type": "array", "items": { "ref": "#item" }, "maxLength": 500 },
          "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" },
          "updatedAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### fm.plyr.actor.profile

```json
{
  "lexicon": 1,
  "id": "fm.plyr.actor.profile",
  "defs": {
    "main": {
      "type": "record",
      "key": "literal:self",
      "record": {
        "required": ["createdAt"],
        "properties": {
          "bio": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 2560 },
          "avatar": { "type": "string", "format": "uri" },
          "createdAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" },
          "updatedAt": { "type": "string", "format": "datetime" }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

---

## glossary

- **PDS**: Personal Data Server — stores your ATProto records and blobs
- **DID**: Decentralized Identifier — persistent account ID (e.g. `did:plc:abc123`)
- **handle**: human-readable account name (e.g. `artist.bsky.social`)
- **NSID**: Namespace Identifier — reverse-DNS lexicon ID (e.g. `fm.plyr.track`)
- **lexicon**: ATProto schema defining a record type's structure
- **collection**: named group of records in a repo, identified by NSID
- **record**: single data entry in a collection
- **TID**: Timestamp Identifier — base32-encoded timestamp used as record key
- **rkey**: Record Key — identifier for a record within a collection
- **strongRef**: reference to a specific record version (URI + CID content hash)
- **Jetstream**: real-time ATProto firehose for record change events
- **AppView**: application service that indexes records from the network
- **developer token**: API auth token from plyr.fm/portal
- **jam**: shared listening room with real-time sync
- **mood search**: semantic search via CLAP audio embeddings (feature-flagged, not GA)
